_meta.name: Gym | Cardiff City Centre | Gym Location

content.heading: How to find us

transportInformation.text:
* Located on Queen Street, outside Tesco (capitol shopping centre)

* Bike racks available

* The closest bus station is located just outside the Capitol shopping centre on Churchill Way, situated just off Queen Street. 2 minute walk from The Gym Group

* Bus routes: 11, 49 and 50

- Multi-story car park within the Capitol Shopping Centre. Parking spaces available

- North Edward Street, situated just off Churchill Way

- Free parking available at The Capitol Shopping Centre car park for up to 2 hours

- Each parking session must be validated by entering the car registration on the device next to the vending machines inside the gym

* Located on Queen Street station terrace

* 2 minute walk from The Gym Group
* Located on Queen Street, inside the Capitol shopping centre

content.gymOverviewText: Our gym in Cardiff city centre has everything you need to move more and feel better, from cardio machines and weights to HYROX classes and PTs. With flexible memberships and a positive atmosphere, fitness fits your life perfectly.

_meta.name: Gym Page | Cardiff City Centre | Rich Text Content | Remotely managed

content.text: The Gym Group Cardiff City Centre may be remotely supervised on certain days to ensure your safety. Learn more about our remotely supervised hours on our [health and safety page](/health-and-safety/).

data.title: Free gym classes for members

data.title: Personal training
data.paragraph: Whether you need exercise-specific advice or want some variety in your workouts, our Cardiff City Centre PTs are ready to support you on your fitness journey.

_meta.name: Gym Page | Shared | Proposition Thumbnail | Classes

image.alt: Member squatting in front the rack with personal trainer
Members stretching at a gym cardio class
Members doing dumbbell back exercises at a gym clas
Members doing rope slams in the gym at a cardio class
Member kneeling by the free weights area

data.quote: It was such a great experience, a lot of likeminded people, supportive and caring. I've learnt a lot and enjoyed as much as I was knocked out after the session! No other gym I recommend then The Gym Group!

I’ve really enjoyed being a member of the gym. It’s helped me keep on track with my fitness goals. It’s given me confidence to try new machines, and new styles of training. The PTs are friendly. I find them very approachable. t’s a welcoming space which I think anyone can enjoy.

image.alt: Member engaging at touch screen inside the gym

data.quote: Going to The Gym Group is like going home  -  it puts me in a really good headspace.

image.alt: Member smiling and giving a thumbs up

data.quote: I'm amazed at how clean everything is. The changing rooms are really clean, like really, really clean. Now, all I want to do is shower here! I feel 100% safe and the staff are great, they're doing an amazing job - hats off to them.

content.heading: Real members, real stories

content.quote: I go 2-3 times a week. Good range of equipment, I also like the layout. Just started doing classes and trainer is very friendly and encouraging.
Friendly staff, well kept equipment and always very clean. It is affordable for a good gym and the app helps so you can see how many people are in and has workouts to help too.
10/10 for a gym at this price point. Staff are all lovely and a wide range of equipment nicely spread out across the gym floor. Always clean and tidy. Highly recommended.

content.subheading: Your workout time is precious, so it's only natural you'd want to know what our members say about our gym before you join.
